'''fathate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:zymotically|zymotically]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-th-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zymotically|zymotically]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| fathate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:fathate|fathate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:fathatesher|fathatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fathatesherĂ«m|fathatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fathatero|fathatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:fathateshĂ«|fathateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fathateshĂ«m|fathateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifathatero|gokifathatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokifathateshĂ«|gokifathateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifathateshĂ«m|gokifathateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gofathankerom|gofathankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofathankeshĂ«|gofathankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofathankeshĂ«m|gofathankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gofathankeya|gofathankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fathaterom|fathaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fathatemu|fathatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:fathateya|fathateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifathaterom|gokifathaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifathatemu|gokifathatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokifathateya|gokifathateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:fathathate|fathathate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:fathathatesher|fathathatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fathathatesherĂ«m|fathathatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fathathatero|fathathatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:fathathateshĂ«|fathathateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fathathateshĂ«m|fathathateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifathathatero|gokifathathatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokifathathateshĂ«|gokifathathateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifathathateshĂ«m|gokifathathateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gofathathankerom|gofathathankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofathathankeshĂ«|gofathathankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofathathankeshĂ«m|gofathathankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gofathathankeya|gofathathankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fathathaterom|fathathaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fathathatemu|fathathatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:fathathateya|fathathateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifathathaterom|gokifathathaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifathathatemu|gokifathathatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokifathathateya|gokifathathateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:fĂŠthĂŠte|fĂŠthĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:fĂŠthĂŠtesher|fĂŠthĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fĂŠthĂŠtesherĂ«m|fĂŠthĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fĂŠthĂŠtero|fĂŠthĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:fĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«|fĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«m|fĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifĂŠthĂŠtero|gokifĂŠthĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokifĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«|gokifĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«m|gokifĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gofĂŠthĂŠnkerom|gofĂŠthĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofĂŠthĂŠnkeshĂ«|gofĂŠthĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofĂŠthĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gofĂŠthĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gofĂŠthĂŠnkeya|gofĂŠthĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fĂŠthĂŠterom|fĂŠthĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fĂŠthĂŠtemu|fĂŠthĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:fĂŠthĂŠteya|fĂŠthĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifĂŠthĂŠterom|gokifĂŠthĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifĂŠthĂŠtemu|gokifĂŠthĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokifĂŠthĂŠteya|gokifĂŠthĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:fafthafte|fafthafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:fafthaftesher|fafthaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fafthaftesherĂ«m|fafthaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fafthaftero|fafthaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:fafthafteshĂ«|fafthafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fafthafteshĂ«m|fafthafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifafthaftero|gokifafthaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokifafthafteshĂ«|gokifafthafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifafthafteshĂ«m|gokifafthafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gofafthafnkerom|gofafthafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofafthafnkeshĂ«|gofafthafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofafthafnkeshĂ«m|gofafthafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gofafthafnkeya|gofafthafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fafthafterom|fafthafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fafthaftemu|fafthaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:fafthafteya|fafthafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifafthafterom|gokifafthafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifafthaftemu|gokifafthaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokifafthafteya|gokifafthafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
